infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Katharos Lens needs microphone access for voice observation capture.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Katharos Lens uses speech recognition to convert your voice to text.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Katharos Lens needs photo library access to attach evidence to observations.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Katharos Lens needs camera access to capture evidence photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Katharos Lens to attach photos as evidence.
